seo.title: Heritage | Big Three Games
seo.description: Discover Heritage, a strategic auto-battler roguelike from Big Three Games where each run builds a lasting legacy.

hero.title: Heritage
hero.summary: Build your legacy across decades, survive pivotal battles, and grow stronger through the Hall of the Ancestors.

features.title: Legacy Progression
features.body: Unlock permanent upgrades through the Hall of the Ancestors and push each new run further.

features.title: Mandatory Battle Beats
features.body: Critical encounters force adaptation and make every strategic choice matter.

features.title: Expressive Build Paths
features.body: Create your own style through unit synergies, tactical positioning, and progression choices.

features.title: Replayable World State
features.body: Runs evolve based on decisions, producing fresh tactical situations and stories.

screenshots.caption: Combat wave with multiple threats entering at once.

screenshots.caption: Build customization screen with upgrade decisions.

cta.title: Wishlist Heritage and Follow Development
cta.body: Track updates, try the demo, and help shape balance through community feedback.
